name: GroovedShaft
_comment: v0.7 example: solid Ø25 mm cylinder along x-axis, length 80 mm, with a circumferential O-ring groove (1 mm deep, 5 mm wide) at the mid-length. Demonstrates revolve_cut chained after revolve_boss on the same axis. Both profiles are on Front Plane with an x-axis centerline. NOTE: the boss profile sits on the +y side of the centerline (so the cylinder body forms on the +y revolved-volume side), and the cut profile sits on the -y side. Empirically this opposite-side placement is required for the chained cut to commit -- a +y cut profile after a +y boss returns None silently. See README 'A note on opposite-side cuts' for the rule.
